title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Nimbus Post - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Nimbus Post - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nimbus Post. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About Nimbus Post:
Nimbus Post is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nimbus Post!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
